arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe's feelings on Graham Potter as ex-Chelsea chief prepares for new role
arts.sum: Graham Potter has long been linked with a move to Manchester United ever since Sir Jim Ratcliffe seized control at Old Trafford and now the former Chelsea and Brighton boss could return

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher and Gary Neville both agree on prediction for Chelsea vs Brighton
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher and Roy Keane have both agreed on a prediction for Chelsea vs Brighton and Hove Albion this weekend.

arts.ttl: Pressure of large transfer fees can be ‘big problem’ for players – Enzo Maresca
arts.sum: Maresca’s expensively-assembled Chelsea side take on Brighton this weekend.

arts.ttl: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca sends £200m reality check to Brighton ahead of clash
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has been impressed by the players Chelsea have purchased from Brighton and spoken highly about the impact of Moises Caicedo and Marc Cucurella this season for the Blues

arts.ttl: KEOWN TALKS TACTICS: Enzo Maresca's fine-tuning has Chelsea look like they are meaning business... it is time we started taking the Blues more seriously
arts.sum: MARTIN KEOWN: Like everyone, I had my reservations before a ball was kicked under Enzo Maresca , a coach who had never managed at a level this unforgiving.

arts.ttl: FIFA set to reveal host venues for next summer's Club World Cup with Chelsea and Man City among the teams set to take in the expanded tournament
arts.sum: Gianni Infantino will appear at the Global Citizen Festival in New York on Saturday to confirm the stadiums that will be used between June 15 to July 13 for the 32-team tournament.

arts.ttl: 'That's surprised me': Craig Burley shares what's shocked him about Chelsea's Nicolas Jackson this season
arts.sum: Craig Burley has been quite “surprised” by one thing he’s seen from Chelsea’s Nicolas Jackson so far this season. Chelsea have made a pretty steady...

arts.ttl: 'He is good': Maresca says one Chelsea player is 'making the players around him better'
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has said that Marc Cucurella has 'something' rate that makes his Chelsea teammates better.

arts.ttl: The man keeping Mudryk at Chelsea amid Maresca doubts
arts.sum: Behdad Eghbali is 'desperate' for Mykhailo Mudryk to come good at Chelsea, according to a report. It is asserted that Eghbali is 'desperate for Mudryk to come good after leading the charge to sign him,' while the player himself is determined to fight for his future at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: 'Gives 100 per cent': Frank Leboeuf has noticed £32m Chelsea player works tirelessly for the team
arts.sum: Frank Leboeuf has just delivered a glowing praise on one Chelsea star by highlighting what a hard worker he is on the football pitch. When...
